notes:
Phase 6: Worker + Client Wiring. 8 tasks executed and closed (mxdx-awe.26-30, mxdx-btk, mxdx-fqt, mxdx-clr). p2p_enabled defaults to false per §4.7; the new code is a strict no-op when disabled. All previously-passing tests continue to pass (zero Phase-6 regressions).

T-63 (mxdx-awe.29, commit 500a701): npm perf baseline captured at packages/e2e-tests/results/npm-p2p-baseline-64b3eb03.json against local tuwunel + ca1-beta Matrix RTT. Federated topology gap filed as mxdx-awe.51 (Phase-7 follow-up).

mxdx-btk (commit b894c61): Matrix-backed HandshakeSigner + PeerKeySource via hybrid option (b') per ADR 2026-04-16-ephemeral-key-cross-cert.md. matrix-sdk 0.16 does not expose a device sign API; Phase-7 mxdx-awe.52 retrofits with matrix-sdk testing feature.

T-60 (mxdx-awe.26, commit 9f03c98): P2PTransport wired into mxdx-worker via crates/mxdx-worker/src/p2p_integration.rs. WorkerP2pSession + build_p2p_session bundle + try_send_via_p2p_or_matrix helper. Megolm<T: Clone> derived for dual-path send. 6 integration tests.

T-61 (mxdx-awe.27, commit 56a3259): BatchedSender::set_batch_window(Duration) + batch_window_for_p2p_state helper. Open → 10ms, non-Open → 200ms. Dynamic window via Arc<Mutex<Duration>>. 3 new tests.

T-62 (mxdx-awe.28, commit 3ea7e1e): P2PTransport wired into mxdx-client daemon (symmetric to worker) with --no-p2p CLI flag for incident diagnostics. 10 integration tests.

mxdx-fqt (commit 358e59e): npm Ed25519-signed Verifying handshake primitives in packages/core/p2p-verify.js. Byte-identical transcript to Rust (cross-runtime vector fixture verify-vectors.json, 6 npm + 2 Rust vector tests). Ed25519 via Node webcrypto. 11 npm unit tests. Integration into p2p-transport.js handshake flow filed as mxdx-awe.53 (Phase-7 follow-up with protocol-version negotiation).

mxdx-clr (commit cfdffbf): restart_ice TURN-refresh wiring at ConfigureIceServers command handler. On RestartIceUnsupported (native datachannel-sys 0.23): tears down channel, transitions to Idle, emits Fallback telemetry. try_send during gap returns FallbackToMatrix. 3 new tests via RestartIceUnsupportedChannel mock.

T-64 (mxdx-awe.30): Full regression pass. Workspace test with --no-fail-fast shows ZERO new failures compared to pre-Phase-6 baseline (64b3eb0). Pre-existing failures (keychain_chain, tombstone_room, client_ls_state_events, client_reconnect, concurrent_sessions, etc.) unchanged.

SECURITY INVARIANTS VERIFIED:
- All outbound paths route through Megolm<Bytes> — structurally impossible to send plaintext via the P2P integration.
- scripts/check-no-unencrypted-sends.sh green.
- publish_p2p_ephemeral_key refuses unencrypted rooms (cardinal rule).
- get_p2p_ephemeral_key requires Device::is_cross_signed_by_owner (ADR 2026-04-16-ephemeral-key-cross-cert).
- No new send_raw / skip_encryption patterns in any Phase 6 diff.

FOLLOW-UPS FILED:
- mxdx-awe.51 (P2): federated perf baseline ca1↔ca2 + setup-time metric
- mxdx-awe.52 (P1): revisit device cross-signing via matrix-sdk testing feature (Phase 7 retrofit)
- mxdx-awe.53 (P1): integrate p2p-verify.js into p2p-transport.js live handshake flow + protocol-version negotiation

follow_ups.title: npm perf baseline: add federated (ca1↔ca2) topology + setup_time metric
Revisit true device cross-signing via matrix-sdk testing feature
Integrate p2p-verify.js into p2p-transport.js handshake flow + protocol-version negotiation

verification_results.cargo_test_mxdx_worker_p2p_wiring: 9 passed (6 T-60 + 3 T-61 window flip rule)
verification_results.security_grep_gate: green — no forbidden patterns in crates/mxdx-p2p

key_decisions: matrix-sdk 0.16 option (a) unreachable for HandshakeSigner — OlmMachine is test-gated, Encryption has no sign() API. Hybrid option (b') used: ephemeral Ed25519 keypair per session, pk published as Megolm-encrypted state event m.mxdx.p2p.ephemeral_key. ADR 2026-04-16-ephemeral-key-cross-cert.md documents the security trade-off. Phase-7 retrofits with matrix-sdk testing feature per mxdx-awe.52.

Megolm<T: Clone> derived to support the dual-send pattern (P2P attempt + Matrix fallback need the same sealed bytes). No new external constructor; pub(crate) constraint preserved. Clone duplicates already-boundary-crossed bytes confined to authorized send surfaces.

BatchedSender dynamic window via Arc<Mutex<Duration>> shared between the public set_batch_window method and the spawned batch_loop. Re-read per iteration so the flip takes effect on the next coalescing cycle.
--no-p2p CLI flag on mxdx-client (global, default false) overrides config.p2p.enabled for incident response diagnostics. Effective P2P mode = cfg.enabled AND NOT no_p2p_cli.

restart_ice tear-down at ConfigureIceServers uses inline teardown_for_turn_refresh to avoid async-fn recursion (apply_command → dispatch → apply_command cycle). Net effect identical to dispatch(Event::Hangup) but breaks the re-entry cycle.
npm p2p-verify.js uses Node webcrypto.subtle Ed25519 (no new npm dep). Transcript layout byte-identical to Rust. Cross-runtime vector fixture locks parity across releases.

Integration into p2p-transport.js's live handshake flow deferred to mxdx-awe.53 (Phase-7 follow-up) because it requires protocol-version negotiation for backward compatibility with peers still speaking the nonce ping-pong.
